pi_items.source: SQLite schema verification: Table name 'tracks' in SQLite becomes 'Track' in HSQLDB/LibreOffice Base
Column name specified in task description and metadata; will be added to Track table
View name specified in task description and metadata
Verified via SQLite query: MediaTypeId 1 = 'MPEG audio file'; 3034 tracks with this type will be mapped to 'Approved'
Verified via SQLite query: MediaTypeId 2 = 'Protected AAC audio file'; 237 tracks with this type will be mapped to 'Pending Review'
Verified via SQLite query: MediaTypeId 4 = 'Purchased AAC audio file'; 7 tracks with this type will be mapped to 'Legacy'
SQLite media_types table: SELECT Name FROM media_types WHERE MediaTypeId = 1
SQLite media_types table: SELECT Name FROM media_types WHERE MediaTypeId = 2
SQLite media_types table: SELECT Name FROM media_types WHERE MediaTypeId = 4

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the standard public Chinook sample database (available at https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database). The Track table currently has 3503 total tracks distributed across 5 media types: 3034 MPEG audio files (MediaTypeId 1), 237 Protected AAC files (MediaTypeId 2), 214 Protected MPEG-4 video files (MediaTypeId 3), 7 Purchased AAC files (MediaTypeId 4), and 11 AAC audio files (MediaTypeId 5). The task requires adding a 'QC_Status' column to the Track table and populating it based on MediaTypeId mappings: value 'Approved' for 3034 MPEG tracks, 'Pending Review' for 237 Protected AAC tracks, 'Legacy' for 7 Purchased AAC tracks, and NULL for the remaining 225 tracks (video files and other audio formats). A view named 'v_QC_Pending_List' must be created to display only tracks with 'Pending Review' status.
